_publications._publicationTitle: Electrical stimulation of Schwann cells on electrospun hyaluronic acid carbon nanotube fibers.

_contextSnippet: Immunohistochemical staining was done 48 hours post stimulation with S100 (red) and DAPI (blue)
details: Successfully used for immunohistochemical staining of Schwann cells at 48 hours post stimulation, showing red fluorescence
